factors.summary: Demand is accelerating, supported by strong order growth across all segments.

evidence.text: Orders of $1,538 million, up 22.0% from $1,261 million in the prior year, and up 18.6% on an organic basis across all segments.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating with strong order growth across all segments.

factors.summary: Order backlog is growing, with new orders outpacing revenue.

evidence.text: Orders of $1,538 million, up 22.0% from $1,261 million in the prior year, and up 18.6% on an organic basis across all segments.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Order backlog is growing, with new orders outpacing revenue.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is expected to be in the range of 5% to 7% for 2021.

evidence.text: We anticipate total revenue growth in the range of 8% to 10% in 2021, with organic revenue growth anticipated to be in the range of 5% to 7%.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is expected to be moderate but positive for 2021.

factors.summary: End markets such as utilities, industrial, and commercial are growing, with utilities and industrial leading the growth.

evidence.text: Utilities revenue increased by approximately 3% organically in the first quarter... Industrial revenue increased by approximately 14% organically in the first quarter... In the commercial markets, organic revenue growth was approximately 5% in the first quarter.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: End markets such as utilities, industrial, and commercial are growing strongly.

factors.summary: Input costs are rising due to supply chain disruptions and component shortages.

evidence.text: We have experienced shortages in the supply of components, parts and raw materials, as well as unpredictable interruptions with our external suppliers in 2021 that have led to increased logistics costs.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Input costs are rising due to supply chain disruptions and component shortages.

factors.summary: Gross and operating margins are expanding due to cost reductions and favorable volume.

evidence.text: Gross margin increased to 39.0% from 36.4%, and operating margin increased to 10.6% from 5.4%. Adjusted operating margin was 11.4% compared to 6.2%.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Gross and operating margins are expanding significantly due to cost reductions and favorable volume.

factors.summary: Restructuring and realignment actions are delivering measurable savings.

evidence.text: During 2021, we expect to incur between $50 million and $60 million in restructuring and realignment costs. We expect to realize approximately $40 million of net savings in 2021.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Restructuring and realignment actions are delivering measurable savings.

factors.summary: Supply chain health is still disrupted due to component shortages and logistics challenges.

evidence.text: We have experienced shortages in the supply of components, parts and raw materials, as well as unpredictable interruptions with our external suppliers in 2021 that have led to increased logistics costs.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Supply chain health is disrupted due to component shortages and logistics challenges.

factors.summary: Management has provided forward guidance for revenue growth in the range of 8% to 10% and organic revenue growth of 5% to 7% for 2021.

evidence.text: We anticipate total revenue growth in the range of 8% to 10% in 2021, with organic revenue growth anticipated to be in the range of 5% to 7%.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management provided specific growth targets, indicating confidence in future performance.

factors.summary: Management is confident in the business outlook, as evidenced by their restructuring actions and cost-saving initiatives.

evidence.text: We will continue to strategically execute restructuring and realignment actions in an effort to optimize our cost structure, improve our operational efficiency and effectiveness, strengthen our competitive positioning and better serve our customers.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strategic actions demonstrate confidence in optimizing operations and improving competitiveness.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include supply chain disruptions and global shortages of electronic components.

evidence.text: If these shortages and interruptions are sustained, or if additional interruptions occur, they could have a negative impact on our results of operations.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Supply chain disruptions and component shortages pose clear near-term risks.

factors.summary: Key sensitivities include global shortage of electronic components and supply chain disruptions.

evidence.text: We anticipate that it will become more difficult to distinguish specific aspects of our operational and financial performance that are most directly related to the pandemic from those more broadly influenced by ongoing macroeconomic, market and industry dynamics that may be, to varying degrees, related to the pandemic and its consequences.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Global shortages and supply chain issues are significant sensitivities impacting performance.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are a headwind due to the ongoing impact of the COVID-19 pandemic.

evidence.text: The COVID-19 pandemic as well as broader market dynamics have adversely affected, and are expected to continue to adversely affect, our supply chains.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Ongoing pandemic impacts and market dynamics create adverse economic conditions.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is deteriorating, with negative free cash flow of $65 million.

evidence.text: Net cash used by operating activities of $26 million... Negative free cash flow of $65 million, down $12 million from the prior year.
evidence.subsection: Key Performance Indicators and Non-GAAP Measures

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Negative free cash flow indicates significant deterioration in financial performance.
